source.name: AkShare stock_zh_a_hist + stock_zh_a_spot_em
source.kind: A-share daily price history with realtime spot overlay
source.note: Custom board lines use member stock change percent; --intraday overlays today's realtime spot quote row when available.
source.amountNote: amount is kept for compatibility and equals turnover. Use volume for share volume and turnover for turnover amount in yuan.
